---
title: "Yixin Cao"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yixincao615@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/yixin-cao-874bb3294
---

Welcome to my website!

I’m a Business Analytics student focused on turning data into actionable insights.

---

### Skills
Python · SQL · Excel · Tableau · Machine Learning

---

### Interests
Customer Analytics · Forecasting · Data Visualization

---

### Current Focus
Working on data-driven projects in analytics and modeling.
